curation_notes: The patch adds the 'synchronized' keyword to the invokeAPI() method in ApiClient.mustache, which is a Mustache code-generation template for the Java ApiClient class. This prevents concurrent threads from interleaving response state (status codes, headers). Location derived directly from the single-file patch diff. No sibling files in custom_templates share the same vulnerability pattern — other templates (api.mustache, model.mustache) serve different roles and do not contain the invokeAPI method. Pre-assigned class 'race-condition' from CWE-362 is correct.
